calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Palm Beach County School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Palm Beach County School District is Monday, August 11, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Palm Beach County School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Palm Beach County School District is Friday, May 29, 2026. The school year runs from August through May, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Palm Beach County School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Palm Beach County School District runs March 16–20, 2026. Palm Beach and Broward share the same break week; Miami-Dade breaks a week later (March 23–27). A standalone Spring Holiday on April 3 adds a no-school day two weeks after the main break.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2025-2026 for Palm Beach County School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Palm Beach County School District runs December 22, 2025–January 2, 2026 (12 days). A teacher workday falls on January 5, so students return Tuesday, January 6, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Thanksgiving break 2025-2026 for Palm Beach County School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving break for Palm Beach County School District runs November 24–28, 2025 (Monday through Friday). Thanksgiving Day falls on November 27. School resumes Monday, December 1, 2025.

yearNumbers.label: Two Fall Holidays
yearNumbers.detail: Palm Beach observes two standalone fall no-school days in September and October — an unusual feature not found in Broward, Miami-Dade, or Orange County calendars.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Holiday
yearNumbers.detail: A standalone Spring Holiday on April 3 extends the post-spring break no-school window — a Palm Beach-specific district tradition.

calendarNotes: Palm Beach County School District begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 11, 2025. In 2025–2026, Palm Beach and Broward County share the same Spring Break window (March 16–20); Miami-Dade breaks a week later (March 23–27). The school year ends May 29, 2026.
